MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Paul Utrecht, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: ZACKS UTRECHT & LEADBETTER, P.C.
Diana D. Sam, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Joan K. Selznick

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ZACKS UTRECHT & LEADBETTER, P.C.'s Motion For Assignment Order is granted. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Karla Ellis-Davis.
Andrew M. Zacks, Esq. for Plaintiff: Zacks Utrecht & Leadbetter, PC.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Joan Keller Selznick as follows:
Damages/Principal $28,969.29
Prejudgment Interest $6,083.54 for a total judgment of $35,052.83.
Judgment signed in open court.
